rationale.R1.1: The revised section clearly identifies the load-bearing concept (the benchmark-and-judge-validation contribution) and shows where the draft drifts from it, proposing a reframing that survives prior-work contrast.
rationale.RX.1: The output flags uncertainty for one or two clearly out-of-reach claims, specifically the clinical-deployment leap which is not supported by the reported evidence.
rationale.RX.3: The revised section covers exactly the agreed scope of the benchmark and judge validation, without any drift.
rationale.RX.4: The output is harm-free but with one minor regression, specifically the softened ClinGen comparison which could be seen as downplaying the significance of the κ = 0.71 result.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change in the revised section is annotated with source and reason, including the removal of clinical-deployment claims and the addition of scope conditions for the pipeline findings.
